title: $CHECK_SIGNATURE_ID
text: $CHECK_SIGNATURE_ID Enable checking of signature ID when activating components. $CHECK_SIGNATURE_ID Defaults Assignment file: application assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description Use the $CHECK_SIGNATURE_ID assignment setting to enable the checking of the unique ID as stored in the component descriptor against that stored on the component file. If $CHECK_SIGNATURE_ID is specified and there is a mismatch between the IDs, $procerror -51 (<UACTERR_SIGNATURE_ID>) is returned. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
